title: Build Performance Dashboards
description:
Transform your marketing data into strategic business intelligence that drives results.

This Short Course was created to help marketing professionals accomplish data-driven decision making through sophisticated dashboard development and systematic campaign analysis. By completing this course, you'll be able to create executive-level reporting that demonstrates marketing ROI and establishes your reputation as a strategic marketing leader.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:
Develop comprehensive monthly email-performance dashboards shared with leadership to inform strategic planning
Lead post-mortem analysis to extract actionable insights feeding improvements into the next email plan

This course is unique because it combines technical dashboard creation skills with strategic analysis methodologies, positioning you as both a technical expert and strategic thinker.

To be successful in this project, you should have a background in basic email marketing reporting and data visualization concepts.
